T0116.title: Fish-Killing Scam
T0116.definition: A telecom fraud scheme where scammers cast a wide net by disseminating false information online, waiting for victims to click links or respond to messages. Once hooked, victims are further manipulated, primarily in loan or investment-related scams.
T0116.description: This term draws an analogy to real-life fishing, where 'anglers' lure victims and 'gutters' execute the fraud steps, causing financial loss to the victim.
